text: The government should break up monopolies and regulate large corporations more aggressively.
Free markets, left alone, produce the best outcomes for the most people.
A universal basic income would do more good than harm.
Marriage should only be between a man and a woman.
Society changes too fast — we need to preserve the traditions that got us here.
Systemic racism is a real and ongoing problem in America.
The government should have broad surveillance powers to prevent terrorism.
I'd rather have a dangerous freedom than a comfortable tyranny.
Law enforcement needs more funding and authority, not less.
America should prioritize its own interests over international cooperation.
We should buy American products even if they cost more.
I'd rather vote for someone I disagree with on half the issues than someone who promises everything and delivers nothing.
Compromise is just another word for surrender.
The perfect policy that never passes is worse than the flawed one that does.
